formula: ABI3 = (max(LEC1, 0.01) * max(LEC2, 0.01) * max(FUS3, 0.01) * max(ABI4, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Auxin = (max(YUC10, 0.01) * max(YUC11, 0.01) * max(TAR1, 0.01) * max(PGP10, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Cytokinin = max(IPT, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(CKX2 * CKX3 * CKX5 * AHP6, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Endosperm_Proliferation = (max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(MINI3, 0.01) * max(IKU2, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(AP2 * Cytokinin * PRC2 * RBR1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FUS3 = (max(ABI3, 0.01) * max(LEC2, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2 * PKL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
IKU2 = (max(BZR1, 0.01) * max(IKU1, 0.01) * max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(MINI3, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(RAV1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Integument_Growth = (max(UBP15, 0.01) * max(KLUH, 0.01) * max(TTG2, 0.01) * max(GIF1, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01) * max(Cell_Proliferation_Duration, 0.01) * max(ANT, 0.01) * max(SEEDSTICK, 0.01))^(1/8) * min(1/max(DA1 * DA2 * EOD1 * SOD7 * DPA4 * AP2 * ARF2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LEC1 = 1.0 * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2 * PKL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LEC2 = max(FUS3, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2 * PKL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
MINI3 = (max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(IKU1, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(RAV1 * AIF2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Ovule_size = (max(ANT, 0.01) * max(Cytokinin, 0.01) * max(Cell_Proliferation, 0.01) * max(SEUSS, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
PRC2 = (max(MEA, 0.01) * max(FIS2, 0.01) * max(FIE, 0.01) * max(MSI1, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(BZR1 * Auxin, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
SHB1 = max(BZR1, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(ABI5 * AIF2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Seed_Size = (max(Integument_Growth, 0.01) * max(Endosperm_Proliferation, 0.01) * max(Ovule_size, 0.01) * max(GIF1, 0.01) * max(Storage_reserves, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(ABA * ABI5, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Storage_reserves = (max(LEC1, 0.01) * max(LEC2, 0.01) * max(FUS3, 0.01) * max(ABI3, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
